specific_question: As of Q3 2025, what certifications or qualifications did Rachel require for customer service representatives?
answer: As of Q3 2025, CSRs needed high school completion, customer service experience, and to complete a Healthcare Customer Service Certificate within their first 6 months.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
